title: list-resume-templates MCP Tool Contract
description: Returns all available professional resume templates with their metadata

tool.name: list-resume-templates
tool.description: Returns all available professional resume templates with metadata to help users select the appropriate template for their needs.

preview.description: Base64 thumbnail or URL to preview image

templates.name: Professional Classic
templates.description: Traditional single-column format ideal for corporate and formal industries

templates.name: Modern Tech
templates.description: Clean, contemporary design for technology professionals

templates.name: Professional Classic
templates.description: Traditional single-column format ideal for corporate and formal industries

testScenarios.description: Should return all templates when no filters applied
assertions: output.templates should be an array
output.templates.length should equal output.count
output.count should be >= 5
each template should have required fields: id, name, description, category, formalityLevel, features, version
template IDs should be unique
output.templates should only contain templates with category='professional'
output.count should match output.templates.length
output.count should be >= 1
output.templates should only contain templates with category='modern'
output.count should match output.templates.length
each template.industryFocus should include 'technology'
output.count should be >= 1

testScenarios.description: Should return empty array for non-existent category
assertions: if no templates match, output.templates should be []
if no templates match, output.count should be 0

testScenarios.description: Should include comprehensive metadata for each template
assertions: each template.id should be kebab-case format
each template.version should be valid semver
each template.formalityLevel should be one of: formal, business, casual
each template.category should be one of: professional, modern, creative, academic, technical
each template.features should be an array with at least 1 item
each template.industryFocus should be an array

testScenarios.description: Should return templates sorted by category then name
assertions: templates should be sorted by category (alphabetically)
within same category, templates should be sorted by name (alphabetically)
